title: hieracium boreale subsp. obliquum
intro: Hieracium boreale subsp. obliquum, also known as a type of hawkweed, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the sunflower family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with Hieracium boreale subsp. obliquum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and support the immune system. In herbal medicine, preparations of this plant are often made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water or using them in tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
